message:
native: fp32 matmul + conformance harness

Multi-buffer compute: uniform dims + two storage reads + one storage
write. WGSL is the textbook one-output-per-thread matmul; not the
production kernel, but enough to validate the harness pattern that
the int4-fp16 conformance port inherits next.

Also: uploadStorageBuffer helper factored from the buffer-roundtrip
path so future kernels share the staging-then-copy upload pattern.

Verified vs JS CPU reference at 4×4×4, 8×16×32, 32×64×128. Drift
scales with K (FMA vs separate mul-add rounding); 1e-2 max relative
error tolerance is normal for fp32 matmul across implementations.
